latestCycle.goal: reduce the sampled wind-model diagnostics cost inside Earth.update without breaking the telemetry path
latestCycle.verifiedImprovement: reducing the wind diagnostics sample target cut model diagnostics from about 29.4–32.1 ms to about 9.1–10.2 ms on due ticks and improved Earth.update p95 from 31.96 ms to 26.32 ms on a fresh live rerun while preserving the existing live fixes; the overall smoothness gate still fails because larger unknown spikes remain

blockingGaps: northern subtropical dry-belt moisture partitioning still fails in both fresh quick and seasonal audits, though the gap is now smaller at 1.029 at 30 days and 1.015 at 90 days
browser/runtime signoff is still blocked by larger remaining Earth.update spikes and weak wind-target diagnostics in the latest live run, even after reducing the model-diagnostics payload cost
annual / 365-day evidence is still missing for any long-horizon or world-class claim
world-class status still requires realism and smoothness to pass in the same browser-backed run
cycleInputs: latest runtime summary from npm run agent:summarize-runtime-log

seasonalDurabilityRecovery.tradeoffNote: Lowering thetaeCoeff to 10.5 recovered the 30-day dry-belt ratio and slightly improved the 90-day ratio as well, so the quick-versus-seasonal tradeoff is materially smaller than before.

runtimeTextureWarningFix.result: fresh reopened localhost tab no longer reproduced the startup THREE.WebGLRenderer texture-update warning

soloMinimapFix.result: fresh solo localhost rerun no longer rendered the lower-right white minimap panel

windDiagnosticsSampling.result: sampled model diagnostics reduced due-tick cost from about 30 ms to about 9-10 ms and improved Earth.update p95 to 26.32 ms, but larger unknown spikes still block signoff

browserObservation.note: The latest fresh solo live run kept both the texture-warning fix and the minimap-panel fix. Sampled wind diagnostics reduced model-diagnostics cost materially, but larger Earth.update spikes still remain.

defaultNextPriority: run a direct src-side smoothness/runtime cycle on the remaining unknown Earth.update spikes and worker/core sync path now that the model-diagnostics payload has been reduced
rerun live verification on the thetaeCoeff=10.5 baseline after the next runtime fix
if runtime smoothness stops blocking signoff, return the next physics cycle to northern subtropical dry-belt moisture partitioning and ITCZ-adjacent hydrology
run the annual planetary audit after the dry-belt fix holds through another seasonal follow-through
keep validation on the clean world-class checkout only
